category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a standard Unix software packaging tool; source_facts.executables include rpm, rpmbuild, rpmspec, and related package-management commands.
display_name_sources: Official rpm.org documentation page brands the project as RPM; source_facts.name is rpm.
docs_sources: Official rpm.org Documentation page says it contains reference documentation shipped with RPM.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/rpm-software-management/rpm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Unix packaging tool; source_facts.executables include command-line RPM tooling.
